mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical correlation with FEDFUNDS changes.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above 5.0 percent, labor market deterioration signals impending corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 5.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales combined with stable consumer prices indicate robust consumer demand without inflationary pressure, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal of rising RSAFS and stable CPIAUCSL yields a negative or zero Rank IC over 20-day horizons across multiple market cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production signals immediate supply-side capacity utilization and short-term earnings momentum, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration fails to predict positive 5-day returns during post-shock recovery periods, with out-of-sample accuracy below 52 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls reflects expanding economic activity and wage growth, which directly supports corporate revenue and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows no predictive power for 20-day SPX direction, with a rolling Rank IC consistently below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Sharp monthly increases in the consumer price index trigger expectations of aggressive monetary tightening, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: SPX forward returns remain positive in over 60 percent of months where CPIAUCSL rises above 0.4 percent month-over-month.

mechanism_narrative: Declining housing starts alongside contracting real GDP indicate a synchronized downturn in residential and aggregate demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The combined signal of falling HOUST and GDPC1 fails to predict negative 60-day returns, with directional accuracy below 48 percent in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production above the 105.0 index threshold confirms full capacity utilization and strong manufacturing output, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns show no positive correlation with INDPRO levels above 105.0, with a t-statistic below 1.5 over rolling 5-year windows.
